---
title: "Discussion Comments (ISA 2026)"
author: "Byunghwan Son (`bson3@gmu.edu`)"
date: "2026-03-22"
    theme: Boadilla
    colortheme: spruce
    fonttheme: default
    shorttitle: Stock Market \& Democratic Resilience
#    logo: logo.jpg
    slide-level: 2
    keep-tex: true
    aspectratio: 169
    header-includes: |
      \setbeamercovered{dynamic}
      \usepackage{soul}
      \usepackage{xcolor}
      \makeatletter
      \newcommand\SoulColor{%
        \let\set@color\beamerorig@set@color
        \let\reset@color\beamerorig@reset@color}
      \makeatother
      \usepackage{pdflscape}
      \usepackage{setspace}
      \usepackage{booktabs}
      \usepackage{threeparttable}
      \usepackage{adjustbox}
      \usepackage{multirow}
      \usepackage{caption}
      \usepackage{amssymb}
      \usepackage{pifont}
      \usepackage{eurosym}
      \usepackage{amsmath}
      \usepackage{ragged2e}
      \usepackage{multicol}
      \setbeamertemplate{navigation symbols}{}
      \setbeamertemplate{footline}[frame number]
      \logo{\includegraphics[height=0.8cm]{logo.jpg}}
---
